---
layout: cv
title: My CV
---

# Tristan Barlow

Student, Director of Finance and Project Management BYUI Recservices

::: {#https://github.com/TristanB15/Portfolio}
<a href="tristanbarlowu59@gmail.com">tristanbarlowu59\@gmail.com</a>
:::

## Currently

Attending Brigham Young University Idaho

### Specialized in

R, Python, Excel, SQL, Accounting, Finances

### Research interests

Business, Sports, Market Research

## Education

`July 2022 - August 2023` **Crafto Hills Community College.**

`January 2024 - now` **Brigham Young University Idaho, Rexburg**

## Projects

Built a swim lesson program from scratch, generating \$90,000 per year.

Helped a local Dermatology Clinic in an effort to boost their viability and marketability.

Built and installed a sports simulator into my facilities, generating \$80,000 of revenue per year.

```{=html}
<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: July 2026 -->
```
